violations.text: The door to the staff toilet room is not self-closing. Staff left to obtain appropriate hardware during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026
Establishment does not have on-site garbage facilities. Establishment must obtain appropriate garbage removal services prior to opening to the public. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2026
The following were observed in poor repair: -tile under 3-bay sink -coving near electrical panel -hole in coving near 3-bay sink -leak at faucet at 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2026
